summary: Testing 4 new Scope module features: seed.py scope_status, Scope reçu in ProjectDetail, Timeline mini-Gantt, Export Excel. 10/10 backend tests PASS, frontend UI largely working with 1 bug found.

ui_bugs.issue: Badges SEC/ÉTENDU/OUT always show 0 because listSnapshots excludes the 'features' field (performance optimization). snap.features is undefined in the list response, so the counts computed in ProjectDetail are always 0.
ui_bugs.rca: service.py list_snapshots uses projection {features: 0}. ProjectDetail uses listSnapshots and tries to count snap.features.filter(...) which returns 0. Fix: either add feature_counts summary (sec_count/etendu_count/out_count) to list_snapshots response, or load full snapshot via getSnapshot(id) per entry in ProjectDetail.

action_items: Fix ProjectDetail Scope reçu badges showing 0 SEC/ÉTENDU/OUT: add sec_count/etendu_count/out_count computed fields to list_snapshots response in service.py (or include minimal summary per snapshot)
critical_code_review_comments: service.py list_snapshots: excludes 'features' field correctly for performance, but ProjectDetail tries to count features from this list — need to add precomputed counts (sec_count, etendu_count, out_count) in the snapshot document or compute on-the-fly in the list endpoint.

verified_features.seed.py scope_status: PASS - SEC=9, ÉTENDU=6, OUT=2, Dev A overload team visible (KPI surcharge=1)
verified_features.GET /api/scope/export-excel: PASS - returns valid XLSX (PK magic bytes), correct content-type
verified_features.GET /api/scope/snapshots/{id}/export-exc: PASS - returns valid XLSX with correct filename in Content-Disposition
verified_features.GET /api/scope/snapshots?project_id=X: PASS - returns only frozen/transmitted snapshots for project
verified_features.Scope page - Timeline button: PASS - present in header, disabled when no snapshot selected
verified_features.ScopeTimeline component: PASS - renders with 3 team rows (Dev A, Dev B, Infra)
verified_features.Timeline green bars: PASS - green bars for features SEC within capacity
verified_features.ProjectDetail - Scope reçu section visib: PASS - section shows when snapshots exist
verified_features.Scope reçu - version/status/capacity: PASS - shows period_ref, version, figé/transmis status, capacity block
verified_features.Scope reçu - SEC/ÉTENDU/OUT badges: FAIL - shows 0 for all (features not loaded in list response)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 10/10 backend tests pass. All 4 features implemented and mostly working. One bug: ProjectDetail Scope reçu shows 0 SEC/0 ÉTENDU/0 OUT because listSnapshots excludes features. Fix: add precomputed counts to list_snapshots service. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_scope_new_features.py
